info.title: Laravel API Docs
info.description: Public and admin API documentation for categories and top people.

tags.name: Public Top People
tags.description: Browse approved top people and submit new candidates for admin review.

tags.name: Admin Authentication
tags.description: Authenticate with email and password to get a Sanctum Bearer token, then send that token to protected /api/admin endpoints.

post.description: Submit admin credentials to receive a Sanctum token. Use the returned token as `Authorization: Bearer {token}` for protected admin endpoints.

device_name.description: Optional device label for the issued token.

200.description: Login successful. Returns the Sanctum Bearer token and the authenticated user.

get.description: Returns the currently authenticated admin user. Requires a valid Sanctum Bearer token.

post.description: Revokes the currently used Sanctum token. Requires a valid Sanctum Bearer token.

get.description: Returns only approved top people together with their category. Supports pagination, category filtering, and name search.

parameters.name: category_id
parameters.description: Filter approved top people by category ID.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search approved top people by name.

parameters.name: per_page
parameters.description: How many approved top people to return per page.

path.description: Base path for paginator generated URLs.

per_page.description: Number of items shown per page.

to.description: Number of the last item in the slice.

total.description: Total number of items being paginated.

post.description: Creates a new top person submission. Public submissions are always saved with `is_approved` set to `false` until an admin approves them.

category_id.description: Category ID for the submitted top person.

201.description: Submission created successfully and is pending admin approval.

examples.message: Top person submitted successfully and is pending admin approval.

message.const: Top person submitted successfully and is pending admin approval.

get.summary: List all categories for admin management
List all top people for admin management

sanctumBearerAuth.description: Use the Sanctum token returned by POST /api/admin/login as Authorization: Bearer {token}.

errors.description: A detailed description of each field that failed validation.
